vorname.label: Vorname
vorname.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

nachname.label: Nachname
nachname.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

telefon.label: Telefon
telefon.description: A valid telephone number (or `null`/`None`). Might include country prefix and should include area code.

status.label: Status
status.description:
One selected option of multiple available options (or `null`/`None`).

The available options are defined in the `lookup_data` attribute of this control.

The field value will be the key in this `lookup_data` attribute (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

objekt.label: Objekt
objekt.description:
A reference to a LivingApp record from the target lookup app 'Objekte' with the id `6a33f570d897d206f67e2416` (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be a valid record URL in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/rest/apps/6a33f570d897d206f67e2416/records/<record-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

titel.label: Titel
titel.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

adresse.label: Adresse
adresse.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

status.label: Status
status.description:
One selected option of multiple available options (or `null`/`None`).

The available options are defined in the `lookup_data` attribute of this control.

The field value will be the key in this `lookup_data` attribute (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

fotos.label: Fotos
fotos.description:
An uploaded file (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be the URL to download the file in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/files/6a33f570d897d206f67e2416/data/<record-id>/<control-identifier>/<internal-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

beschreibung.label: Beschreibung
beschreibung.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`/`None`).

verfuegbar_ab.label: Verfügbar ab
verfuegbar_ab.description:
A calendar date consisting of year, month and day (or `null`/`None`)

The field value will be a string in the format `<YYYY>-<MM>-<DD>` (or `null`/`None`).

For example: `2000-02-29`.

For `POST`/`PUT`/`PATCH` requests the REST API uses a liberal parsing approach so that strings like `2026`, `February 29, 2000 12:34 MEST`, `letztes Jahr` etc. will be accepted as value date values. However this runs the risk of parsing ambiguous values incorrectly. To ensure reliable parsing it is best to use the canonical format specified above.

titel.label: Titel
titel.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

termin.label: Termin
termin.description:
A specific moment in time consisting of year, month, day, hour and minute (or `null`/`None`)

The field value will be a string in the format `<YYYY>-<MM>-<DD>T<HH>:<MM>` (or `null`/`None`).

For example: `2000-02-29T11:30`.

For `POST`/`PUT`/`PATCH` requests the REST API uses a liberal parsing approach so that strings like `2026`, `February 29, 2000 12:34 MEST`, `letztes Jahr` etc. will be accepted as value datetime values. However this runs the risk of parsing ambiguous values incorrectly. To ensure reliable parsing it is best to use the canonical format specified above.
